trigger_reason: step 13 FIRED for R843; step 13.5 v11 adversarial attack triggered.

attacks.claim: Fatou-set membership = thresholded softmax; equivalent to top-k softmax with learnable threshold
attacks.evidence: Fatou-set indicator could be implemented as score > threshold mask; top-k softmax does similar
attacks.rebuttal: Fatou set is defined by ITERATIVE DYNAMICAL STABILITY of the score function under iteration f(s) = phi(s, attention_logits); a point is in the Fatou set iff orbit {f^n(s)} is bounded as n -> inf. This is a STRUCTURAL property of the score-attention landscape, not a learnable scalar threshold. Top-k softmax uses a CARDINALITY mask (top-k by rank); Fatou-set softmax uses a DYNAMICAL stability mask (bounded under iteration). These are different operations; gradient signature is distinguishable (Fatou-set indicator has discontinuous boundaries at the Julia-set level). Training penalty maintains non-trivial dynamical structure (regularizer pushes toward Fatou-stable score landscape).
C_baseline is standard softmax; B_control is also softmax-attention; spec correctly compares. Fatou-set distinguishability holds at dynamical structure level.

rationale: Fatou-set softmax variant: Fatou set is defined by iterative dynamical stability (not a learnable scalar threshold); structurally distinct from top-k softmax. Training penalty maintains non-trivial Fatou-stable score landscape. Post-attack distinguishability TRUE.
